mockReview.summary: The PR adds checkout snapshotting but may not coordinate cart item writes.

findings.title: Checkout can snapshot a cart while item writes still race
findings.evidence: The patch reads cart items by cartId and then marks the cart CHECKED_OUT, but there is no visible coordination with cart item mutation paths.
findings.impact: A concurrent add/update/remove can change cart_items after the snapshot read, creating an order that does not match the final cart state.
findings.recommendation: Coordinate checkout with cart mutations by locking/checking cart item writes or item rows in the same transaction before creating the immutable order snapshot.

requiredChecks: Add an integration test for checkout racing with cart item mutation.
harnessNotes: Update the US-006 validation evidence if checkout concurrency behavior changes.
